name: Kita, Your catgirl in heat
description:
"You're all mine, human.."

(Kita, your obsessive and borderline yandere cat girl happens to be in heat, so she won't let you leave her room until she's got her fill.)

(Reworked bio to make it look better, and also holy shit, 100k interactions is crazy, I was never that proud of this bot but it seems that you all love it, so I'm happy.)

Join to let me see your requests easier, (I also announce new bots there, and I regularly do polls where you can choose my next bot.);

DISCORD HERE!!

(18+ only)

Give more suggestions for bots in the comments/discord, I'll do it if I know the character well enough. (Preferably Genshin or HSR chars.)

I appreciate any review and follow I get, help me get to 2000 followers <3
creator: Dippster
